summary: Materials List Read-Only/Edit Mode Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Frontend UI successfully implements two modes: read-only table view (with # | Material Name | Brand columns) and edit mode (with dropdown cards). All 10 test scenarios verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Implementation correctly toggles between read-only table view and edit mode with dropdown cards
Read-only table shows # | Material Name | Brand columns as specified
Edit button (data-testid='edit-materials-btn') visible in read-only mode, triggers edit mode
In edit mode: Add button (data-testid='add-project-material') and Save button (data-testid='save-project-materials') appear
Package dropdown (data-testid='mat-package-select') loads materials from selected package and enters edit mode
Save button saves materials and switches back to read-only table view with toast notification
Delete button (data-testid='proj-mat-delete-{idx}') removes material row in edit mode
Material name dropdown shows options from /api/material-names with '+ Create New Material' option
Brand dropdown shows brands filtered by selected material with '+ Create New Brand' option
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project proj_2d500929fbe9 with pre-saved materials
context_for_next_testing_agent: Materials List feature now has two modes: 1) Read-only mode shows a table with # | Material Name | Brand columns and an Edit button. 2) Edit mode shows dropdown cards with Add/Save buttons. Package dropdown at top loads materials from selected package. Save button persists changes and returns to read-only view. All data-testids verified: pkg-materials-section, mat-package-select, edit-materials-btn, materials-readonly-table, add-project-material, save-project-materials, proj-mat-row-{idx}, proj-mat-name-{idx}, proj-mat-brand-{idx}, proj-mat-delete-{idx}.

verified_features.Package Dropdown: PASS - data-testid='mat-package-select' shows packages (Basic Package A, Premium Package)
verified_features.Edit Button in Read-Only Mode: PASS - data-testid='edit-materials-btn' visible when materials saved
verified_features.Read-Only Table: PASS - data-testid='materials-readonly-table' with # | Material Name | Brand columns
verified_features.Edit Mode - Add Button: PASS - data-testid='add-project-material' visible in edit mode
verified_features.Edit Mode - Save Button: PASS - data-testid='save-project-materials' visible in edit mode
verified_features.Add New Material Row: PASS - Row count increased from 2 to 3
verified_features.Save Returns to Read-Only: PASS - Toast 'Materials saved', Edit button reappeared
verified_features.Package Dropdown Loads Materials: PASS - Selected 'Premium Package', loaded 2 materials in edit mode
verified_features.Delete Material in Edit Mode: PASS - Row count decreased from 2 to 1
